common.privacy.title: Privacy Policy (Provider Portal)
common.privacy.whatIsThisText: This privacy policy applies to our internal provider/licensee portal (“Portal”). The portal is intended for registered users (e.g. licensees, employees, administrators) to create offers, manage bookings, generate invoices/documents (PDF/CSV), and maintain content such as news or coach profiles.
common.privacy.data.accountText: Name (if stored), email, password hash, roles/permissions, session/token data.
common.privacy.data.businessText: Bookings, cancellations, terminations, invoice data, documents (PDF/CSV), and if applicable DATEV export data.
common.privacy.data.customerText: if licensees manage customer data in the portal (e.g. participants, contact details, booking history).
common.privacy.data.technicalText: IP address, log files, browser/device information, timestamps, error messages.
common.privacy.section.usage: What do we use the data for?
common.privacy.usage.portal: Provision of the portal, user management, login/security
common.privacy.usage.operations: Execution/management of offers, bookings, invoices, and documents
common.privacy.usage.support: Support, communication, error analysis, and system stability
common.privacy.usage.legal: Fulfilment of legal obligations (e.g. retention obligations)
common.privacy.legal.contractText: (contract/pre-contractual measures): portal provision, account, booking/invoicing processes.
common.privacy.legal.legitimateText: (legitimate interest): IT security, abuse/fraud prevention, error diagnosis, system stability.
common.privacy.legal.consentText: (consent), if we use optional analytics/marketing tools (currently only if activated).
common.privacy.rolesText: Depending on the use case, licensees may manage data of their own end customers (e.g. participants) in the portal. In this case, licensees may be independent controllers for this end-customer data. As the portal operator, we provide the technical platform and process data for the provision of the portal and for contract fulfilment.
common.privacy.rolesNote: Note: Whether additional data processing agreements (DPA) are required depends on the specific setup and responsibilities.
common.privacy.hostingIntro: We operate/host the portal and the associated API/database through technical service providers. Personal data may be processed in this context.
common.privacy.processingText: Where required, we conclude data processing agreements (DPA) with service providers in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR.
common.privacy.loginText: For the operation of the portal, we use technically necessary cookies/tokens to enable logins (session) and security functions. Without these functions, the portal cannot be operated reliably.
common.privacy.logsText: To ensure stability and security, we process log data (e.g. IP address, timestamps, requested resources, status codes). This is based on Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in IT security and abuse prevention).
common.privacy.recipients.accounting: Payment/accounting processes (e.g. DATEV export) only if you use and configure them in the portal
common.privacy.recipients.authorities: Authorities/public bodies if there is a legal obligation
common.privacy.thirdCountryText: If service providers outside the EU/EEA are used, we ensure an adequate level of data protection (e.g. EU standard contractual clauses).
common.privacy.retentionText: We store personal data only as long as necessary for the stated purposes or as long as legal retention obligations exist (e.g. under tax/commercial law).
common.privacy.rightsText: Where applicable, you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
common.privacy.contactDataProtectionText: If you have questions about data protection, please contact
